title: From Genetic Variant to Wet-lab: Accelerating the path from hypothesis to experiment
summary: Google DeepMind's Antigravity Science Skills is an agentic workbench that integrates access to over 30 scientific databases and frontier models to accelerate research workflows. The demo shows how researchers can move from genetic variant observation to wet-lab experiment design in minutes.
